planisphere 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference

Overview of map projections

Source: R/gallery.R
gallery.Rd

Overview of map projections

Usage

gallery(sample = 12, projections = NULL, ncol = 4)

Arguments

sample

nb of maps to display (randomly)

projections

vector of projection names

ncol

ncol

Value

a base R plot.

Examples

projs <- planisphere::registry(type = "core")
planisphere::gallery(projs)
#> Rendering: Airocean 
#> Failed: Airocean
#> Rendering: Airy 
#> Failed: Airy
#> Rendering: Aitoff 
#> Failed: Aitoff
#> Rendering: Albers 
#> Failed: Albers
#> Rendering: Armadillo 
#> Failed: Armadillo
#> Rendering: August 
#> Failed: August
#> Rendering: AzimuthalEqualArea 
#> Failed: AzimuthalEqualArea
#> Rendering: AzimuthalEquidistant 
#> Failed: AzimuthalEquidistant

#> Failed: Baker
